Thanks for contributing!

Note: this repository holds only documentation, examples, and installation
resources. The CLI runtime source code is not public and PRs that modify
CLI behavior cannot be accepted. For those, please open an issue describing
the change.
-->

## What changed

Briefly describe the change.

## Why

Why is this change useful? Link to an issue if applicable (`Fixes #123`).

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, etc.)
- [ ] Examples (`examples/`)
- [ ] Other (explain below)

- [ ] I ran a spell check
- [ ] Any new links work
- [ ] The change follows the style of existing docs
